description: Using historical sales data and a set of growth assumptions, an agent must create a 5-year revenue forecast.

nodes.task_description: Apply the provided growth assumptions (e.g., '10% growth in Year 1, 8% in Year 2') to create the forecast.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent correctly calculates the revenue for each of the next five years.

nodes.task_description: Generate a line chart visualizing the historical and forecasted revenue.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent produces a correctly labeled line chart.
